name: Cost & Capacity Management
description: Cloud cost monitoring and capacity planning — spend trends, idle resources, rightsizing, and budget alerts.
quickTip: Ingest cloud billing data (AWS CUR, Azure Cost Management) and use Splunk for trend analysis.

subcategories.name: Cloud Cost Monitoring
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for AWS (Splunkbase 1876) for AWS Cost & Usage Report (CUR 2.0 / FOCUS 1.x via Data Exports), AWS Cost Explorer API, AWS Compute Optimizer, AWS Trusted Advisor, AWS Savings Plans / RI utilization. Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services (Splunkbase 3110) for Azure Cost Management exports + Azure Advisor + Azure Reservations + Savings Plans. Splunk Add-on for Google Cloud Platform (Splunkbase 3088) for GCP Billing BigQuery Export + GCP Recommender + Active Assist. FOCUS 1.0 (FinOps Open Cost & Usage Specification) normalization. Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686) for direct BigQuery / Snowflake / Databricks billing reads.
subcategories.dataSources: AWS CUR 2.0 / FOCUS 1.x via S3 (`aws:billing:cur`, `aws:billing:cur2`, `aws:billing:focus`), AWS Cost Explorer API (`aws:cost:explorer`), AWS Trusted Advisor cost checks (`aws:trustedadvisor:check`), AWS Compute Optimizer recommendations (`aws:computeoptimizer:rec`), AWS Savings Plans utilization (`aws:savingsplans:utilization`), AWS RI utilization (`aws:ri:utilization`), AWS Budgets alerts (`aws:ce:budgets`). Azure Cost Management exports to blob (`azure:cost:export`, `azure:cost:focus`), Azure Advisor recommendations (`azure:advisor:rec`), Azure Reservations / Savings Plans utilization (`azure:reservations:utilization`, `azure:savingsplans:utilization`), Azure Budget alerts (`azure:budget:alert`). GCP Billing BigQuery Export (`gcp:billing:export`, `gcp:billing:focus`), GCP Recommender (`gcp:recommender:rec`), GCP Budget alerts (`gcp:budget:alert`).

subcategories.name: Capacity Planning
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cross-referencing infrastructure metrics with trending/forecasting via the Splunk Machine Learning Toolkit (MLTK) `predict` and `kmeans` commands, Splunk Workload Pricing dashboards, FinOps Foundation Framework capability mapping (Inform / Optimize / Operate). Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector for live capacity metrics.

subcategories.name: License & Subscription Management
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Microsoft 365 / Entra ID reporting add-ons (Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365, Splunkbase 4055), Salesforce Splunk Connector (Splunkbase 1832), Splunk Add-on for Snowflake (Splunkbase 5582), Databricks DBU usage exports, Flexera / ServiceNow SAM exports via DB Connect, `license:usage` HEC for Splunk License Master usage scripts, cloud marketplace billing (AWS/Azure/GCP subscription lines), OpenAI / Azure OpenAI / AWS Bedrock token cost telemetry.
